positive: Minimalist line-art composition of a nocturnal cityscape view seen through a window pane, dominated by strong silhouettes of stylized rooftop elements and distant geometric towers. The primary subjects include crescent moons, stylized constellations, and abstract wisps of smoke emanating from chimneys. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, cerulean, and glowing gold accents. The style must evoke a blend of Art Nouveau and brutalist geometry, rendered with precise, clean black linework against a contrasting muted background. Highly graphic, centered composition, perfect for repeating print patterns.
